QA API tests
test_health
GET /api/health/ returns 200 with {status: ok} matching the schema
test_schema_validation
POST /todos/ response matches the Todo JSON schema
GET /todos/ response matches the Todo list JSON schema
GET /todos/{id}/ response matches the Todo JSON schema
PATCH /todos/{id}/ response matches the Todo JSON schema
PUT /todos/{id}/ response matches the Todo JSON schema
GET /todos/ returns a plain array — no pagination wrapper
test_todos_crud
POST /todos/ returns 201 and the contract Todo shape
GET /todos/ returns 200 and is ordered newest-first
GET /todos/{id}/ returns 200 for existing, 404 for missing
PATCH /todos/{id}/ toggles completed and returns 200
PUT /todos/{id}/ replaces the resource and returns 200
DELETE /todos/{id}/ returns 204 and the todo is gone
test_todos_error_cases
PATCH /todos/{id}/ with a blank title returns 400 matching error schema
PATCH /todos/{id}/ for a non-existent todo returns 404
PUT /todos/{id}/ with a blank title returns 400 matching error schema
PUT /todos/{id}/ for a non-existent todo returns 404
DELETE /todos/{id}/ for a non-existent todo returns 404
POST /todos/ with a 256-character title returns 400
POST /todos/ without a 'completed' field defaults completed to false
test_todos_validation
POST /todos/ with an empty title returns 400 with a field error
POST /todos/ with a whitespace-only title returns 400
QA UI e2e tests
test_complete_todo
A user can mark a seeded todo as completed
test_create_todo
A user can add a new todo from the UI
test_delete_todo
A user can delete a seeded todo
test_edge_cases
Whitespace-only title shows the required-field validation error
Leading and trailing spaces are trimmed before the todo is created
A 255-character title is accepted and displayed in the list
Completed state is persisted after a full page reload
A completed todo can be unchecked back to incomplete
Two todos with identical titles can coexist in the list
test_ordering
Newly added todos appear newest-first in the list
test_ui_states
Empty state message is shown when the API returns an empty list
Error alert is shown when the API returns a 500 error
Clicking Retry recovers from an API error and shows the todo list
test_validation
Submitting a blank title shows a validation error
